what_it_does: Composition member's V-surface research report (dated 2026-06-17), produced by 4 code-grounded research agents across vi-visual-dev (overlay), the company repo, and counterpart/design. Maps what exists, how it works, and the gaps for the V slot/socket system, the mode→colour system, and the type-builder/archetype layer, then names the genuinely-unbuilt frontier and the seams to other members.
observations: Net headline: the full V-surface is ~70% structurally present in composition's lane; the frontier is RECURSION + RESOLUTION + PERSISTENCE, not new grammar.
Names the 4-layer placement (THE_FACTORY.md:458-470): DNA=identity, FACTORY/vi-visual-dev=type-builder, GALLERY=content+scenes, COMPANY/~/company=address-resolution+models+substrate.

Distinguishes three composition primitives precisely: SLOTS (child component composition, accepts-validated), SOCKETS (addressable value inputs, cascade-resolved), CONNECTIONS (a socket binding holding a child component as an emerging sub-surface) — with file/line citations (renderer/slots.js, v-symbol-sockets.js, connection-mount.js mountConnection:71).
Identifies the KEYSTONE: definition-renderer.js renderDefinition:595, composition-generic (dispatches only on definition.component), with a reactive rerender at :705.
Key persistence gap: source-of-truth TODAY is localStorage not Supabase; visual_dev_component_registry table is the designed home; company-side runtime/vi_vision.py already reads/writes it for real.

Mode→colour section: 19-theme palette + served-cascade.js whole-UI re-resolve engine exist, but the mode tint dead-ends at --vi-mode-primary (2 consumers) instead of color.primary (68 consumers); 'normal=company gold #E3C421' is UNMET because seeded Vi DS primary = legacy blue #0066ff.

Type-builder section: only 4 atomic types exist; no render-archetype concept; proposes adding an optional 'archetype' field + a loud-lookup archetype registry above the keystone (render_declaration.py exact→family→bare→UNDECLARED-LOUD pattern).
States no slide/deck/carousel renderer exists in either repo; proposes modeling a slide as a sequence/flow archetype over an ordered list of addresses.
Lists the 6-verb gallery contract (navigate/drive/open-source/ask/annotate/generate) and a 'smallest path to prove-on-one' build sequence.
standouts: The precise three-way distinction (slots vs sockets vs connections) with the connection-as-emerging-sub-surface named as the spine of the V-surface vision.

The diagnosis that the mode-tint is an additive parallel layer writing 2 consumers instead of routing through the proven served-cascade onto color.primary's 68 consumers — 'two writers, unreconciled'.
The frontier reduction to RECURSION (lift dispatch into the keystone) + RESOLUTION (route mode through the one cascade) + PERSISTENCE (localStorage→Supabase) rather than new grammar.
conventions: Code-grounded with file:line citations throughout; verification states noted (just-shipped/verified vs designed).
Extend-don't-fork / reuse-the-existing-law framing for every recommendation (e.g. backward-compatible optional archetype field).
Seams section enumerates what composition needs/provides to DNA, fork, projection, recollection — 'meet at the data, no cross-repo import'.
concerns: Multiple precise but unverified-against-current-code claims (e.g. line numbers, 'just shipped'); the report itself flags some joins as the unverified discriminator (the slot→real-data binding).
The persistence gap (localStorage as source of truth) is a real file-local-adjacent smell it surfaces: the loop is plumbed but live durability is localStorage.
notes: Composition's deepest single technical map of the V-surface — read for the slots/sockets/connections distinction, the keystone renderer, the mode→colour mis-wire, and the archetype-field proposal.
questions: Have the 'just-shipped' socket-materials and the served-cascade engine been verified together since this write, or only individually?
Is the localStorage→Supabase setDurableStore thread the agreed fix, and who owns applying it?
Does the proposed archetype registry actually get adopted, or does DNA's layout engine (F19 in the sibling file) already cover the archetype role?
purpose_vs_actual: Match — it states it is research feeding the lead's synthesis (not a build), and delivers a structured what-exists/how/gaps/beyond map with explicit 'build only after the lead assembles' framing.
apparent_themes: Recursion, resolution, persistence as the real frontier
One generic keystone renderer, composition over per-screen code
Mode as an argument to one cascade (re-resolve, not re-tint)
Extend existing laws rather than fork
intention_signals: Trying to prove that the V-surface is mostly already present and that the remaining work is continuations of existing laws (recursive dispatch, cascade routing, durable registry, optional archetype layer), giving the lead a concrete buildable-now smallest path.
novelty: The crisp slots/sockets/connections taxonomy and the served-cascade-as-the-one-true-mode-path diagnosis — a specific re-wire ('re-point the mode signal onto the proven whole-UI path, seed default to gold') rather than a redesign.
contribution: Contributes the detailed V-surface technical inventory: the composition-primitive taxonomy, the keystone renderer location, the mode→colour mis-wire diagnosis, the persistence gap, the archetype-field mechanism, the 6-verb contract, and the smallest-path build sequence.
summary_for_embedding: Composition member's V-surface research report mapping the existing slot/socket/connection grammar, the keystone renderer, the mode→colour cascade, the type-builder/archetype layer, the gaps (recursion/resolution/persistence), and the seams to other fabric members.
intention_for_embedding: To prove the V-surface is ~70% structurally present and that remaining work is continuations of existing laws, giving the lead a code-grounded what-exists/how/gaps/beyond map and a smallest buildable path.
